positive: A complex, symmetrical geometric pattern inspired by Art Deco architecture and Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e). The design features stylized waves, sunburst motifs, and interlocking geometric shapes in a limited palette of deep indigo, gold, and terracotta. Vector art style, seamless repeat pattern.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy lines, photorealism, gradient fade
